'''yatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dreadfully|dreadfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dreadfully|dreadfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yatate|yatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yatatesher|yatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatatesherĂ«m|yatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yatatero|yatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yatateshĂ«|yatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatateshĂ«m|yatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyatatero|gokiyatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyatateshĂ«|gokiyatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatateshĂ«m|gokiyatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyatankerom|goyatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyatankeshĂ«|goyatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyatankeshĂ«m|goyatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyatankeya|goyatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yataterom|yataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatatemu|yatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yatateya|yatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyataterom|gokiyataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatatemu|gokiyatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyatateya|gokiyatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yatatate|yatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yatatatesher|yatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatatatesherĂ«m|yatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yatatatero|yatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yatatateshĂ«|yatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatatateshĂ«m|yatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyatatatero|gokiyatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyatatateshĂ«|gokiyatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatatateshĂ«m|gokiyatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyatatankerom|goyatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyatatankeshĂ«|goyatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyatatankeshĂ«m|goyatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyatatankeya|goyatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yatataterom|yatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yatatatemu|yatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yatatateya|yatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyatataterom|gokiyatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyatatatemu|gokiyatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyatatateya|gokiyatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠte|yĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠtesher|yĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠtero|yĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠtĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠtĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠtĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠterom|yĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠtemu|yĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠtĂŠteya|yĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠtĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠtĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yaftafte|yaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yaftaftesher|yaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaftaftesherĂ«m|yaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yaftaftero|yaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yaftafteshĂ«|yaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaftafteshĂ«m|yaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyaftaftero|gokiyaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyaftafteshĂ«|gokiyaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyaftafteshĂ«m|gokiyaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyaftafnkerom|goyaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyaftafnkeshĂ«|goyaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyaftafnkeshĂ«m|goyaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyaftafnkeya|goyaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yaftafterom|yaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaftaftemu|yaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yaftafteya|yaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyaftafterom|gokiyaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyaftaftemu|gokiyaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyaftafteya|gokiyaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
